value.found_quote: When Claude writes a workflow for a task you'll repeat, you can save that run's script as a command. A process like a review you run on every branch then runs the same orchestration each time.
value.rationale: The page has a section titled "Save the workflow for reuse" describing how to save a workflow run's script as a slash command (running as /<name> in future sessions), substantiating the claim.
